name: Postmark
description: Monitor Postmark transactional email servers for access and TLS delivery compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Postmark at https://account.postmarkapp.com
2. Go to Account → API Tokens
3. Copy your Account API Token (not the Server token)
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Account API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Postmark Account → API Tokens. Use the Account token, not the Server token.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Postmark email servers and verifies they are configured correctly
